message:
feat(wezterm): wait_for_codex_session_summary_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds Cx-first variant of the standalone Codex session-summary wait
helper — the final wait-loop surface in wezterm.rs missing Cx
coverage. Mirrors the tick 23 PaneWaiter::wait_for_with_cx pattern.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+112 src)

   Adds `wait_for_codex_session_summary_with_cx(cx, source, pane_id,
   timeout, options)`. Behavior:

     * Pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()` before the first poll. Returns
       the pre-cancellation empty snapshot (matched: false, polls: 0,
       elapsed_ms: 0) without touching the source.

     * Mid-loop `cx.checkpoint()` after each poll.

     * `sleep_with_cx(cx, duration)` bounds the between-poll
       backoff sleep.

   Cancellation collapses to the timeout-shaped result
   (`matched: false`) for a stable surface — unlike
   `PaneWaiter::wait_for_with_cx` (tick 23) which introduces a
   dedicated `WaitResult::Cancelled` variant.

   Rationale: `CodexSummaryWaitResult` is a richer struct
   (token_usage + resume_hint markers, tail hash, elapsed_ms) that
   downstream consumers inspect directly. Adding a Cancelled variant
   would require more significant downstream churn and the
   timeout-shaped collapse is operationally indistinguishable for
   the current consumer (Codex autoresume detection).

   Legacy `wait_for_codex_session_summary` preserved; strictly
   additive.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
    (no new tests — wait-loop contract covered by existing
    wait_for_codex tests via shared observable shape)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. All wait-loop surfaces in
wezterm.rs now have Cx-first entry points: PaneWaiter::wait_for
(tick 23), wait_for_codex_session_summary (this tick). The only
remaining ambient-Cx wait is the `PaneTextSource::get_text` trait
call which is a trait-level refactor out of scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
